params.script:
import dataiku
import pandas as pd
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

runs_dataset = dataiku.Dataset("pipeline_runs")
df = runs_dataset.get_dataframe()

if df.empty:
    raise Exception("PIPELINE_RUNS is empty — ingestion has never completed successfully")

df.columns = [c.upper() for c in df.columns]
df['RUN_TS'] = pd.to_datetime(df['RUN_TS'], utc=True)
cutoff = datetime.now(timezone.utc) - timedelta(hours=24)
recent_success = df[(df['STATUS'] == 'success') & (df['RUN_TS'] >= cutoff)]

if recent_success.empty:
    raise Exception(f"No successful pipeline run in the last 24h. Last run: {df['RUN_TS'].max()}")

latest = recent_success.sort_values('RUN_TS').iloc[-1]
print(f"Pipeline check passed — last successful run: {latest['RUN_TS']}")

params.sql:
ALTER DYNAMIC TABLE MUSIC_GENRES.ANALYTICS.ARTISTS_CLEAN REFRESH;
ALTER DYNAMIC TABLE MUSIC_GENRES.ANALYTICS.TAG_CO_OCCURRENCE REFRESH;

params.script:
from dataiku.core.sql import SQLExecutor2

executor = SQLExecutor2(connection="mmanson01")

try:
    df = executor.query_to_df("""
        SELECT 
            METRIC_NAME,
            TABLE_NAME,
            VALUE,
            MEASUREMENT_TIME
        FROM SNOWFLAKE.CORE.DATA_METRIC_FUNCTION_RESULTS
        WHERE TABLE_NAME IN ('ARTISTS_RAW', 'ARTISTS_CLEAN')
        ORDER BY MEASUREMENT_TIME DESC
        LIMIT 20
    """)
    
    if df.empty:
        print("WARNING: No DMF results found — DMFs may not have fired yet")
    else:
        df.columns = [c.upper() for c in df.columns]
        print(df.to_string(index=False))
        
        dupes = df[df['METRIC_NAME'] == 'DMF_DUPLICATE_ARTISTS']
        if not dupes.empty and dupes.iloc[0]['VALUE'] > 0:
            raise Exception(f"Duplicate artists in ARTISTS_CLEAN: {dupes.iloc[0]['VALUE']}")

except Exception as e:
    if 'DATA_METRIC_FUNCTION_RESULTS' in str(e):
        print("WARNING: SNOWFLAKE.CORE.DATA_METRIC_FUNCTION_RESULTS not available on this Snowflake tier — skipping DMF check")
        print("DMF results can be queried on paid Snowflake tiers after scheduler fires")
    else:
        raise

print("DMF check step complete")
